name: tcg-sniper-deals-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper for the existing TCG Sniper Deals Flask + PWA app.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:config && npx cap sync
scripts.android:add: npm run sync:config && npx cap add android
scripts.ios:add: npm run sync:config && npx cap add ios
scripts.android:open: npm run sync:config && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:open: npm run sync:config && npx cap open ios
